name: Mutual of Omaha (Living Promise)
scriptSnippet: Since you mentioned covering burial costs, Mutual of Omaha offers a strong day-one final expense path for managed health profiles.

name: AIG (Guaranteed Issue)
scriptSnippet: With the health concerns you shared, AIG's guaranteed issue path can keep coverage available without medical questions.

name: Foresters (PlanRight)
scriptSnippet: Foresters is a reliable final expense comparison option when we need flexibility around health history.

name: Ethos (Term)
scriptSnippet: Ethos can be a fast term option when speed matters and health is in a healthy-to-managed range.

name: SBLI (EasyTrak Term)
scriptSnippet: SBLI often fits younger term shoppers looking for straightforward underwriting and affordability.

name: Mutual of Omaha (Term Life Express)
scriptSnippet: Mutual of Omaha Term Life Express supports a broad age range when we need term beyond the digital-only lanes.

name: Corebridge (Term)
scriptSnippet: Corebridge is useful when we want to optimize term structure and compare beyond speed-first quotes.
